items.title: Alex Manninger, former Arsenal keeper, dies at 48
items.summary: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Alex Manninger has died at the age of 48.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Shubhankar fires 64 to close in on a win at Boulders Classic
items.summary: The 29-year-old Shubhankar (66-66-64), a two-time DP World Tour winner, matched the course record set by Honey Baisoya a day earlier. He is now at 20-under 196 with one round to...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Arshdeep and Prabhsimran star as PBKS hammer MI
items.summary: PBKS rose to the top of the table with their fourth win, while MI have now lost four games in a row
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
